description.value:
Receive Medication data MA building blocks for patient J. de XXX_Luzac
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_kwalificatie_medicatiegegevens_ontvangen_MA
Original description: KWAL Medicatiegegevens MA script 5
Receive Medication data MA resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '15814') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '38644') ))).where(modifierExtension.where(url = 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-StopType').value.coding.code = '410546004').count() = 2

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '15814') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '38644') ))).where(modifierExtension.where(url = 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-StopType').exists().not()).count() = 2

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '15814|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.10' (TEMAZEPAM CAPSULE 20MG)
